title: ADK-301: Agent-to-Agent (A2A) Orchestration
author: Google Cloud
description: Design and orchestrate multi-agent collaboration environments. Configure A2AServer routing, launch remote agents, and write discovery card manifests.

features.title: A2AServer Routing
features.description: Master the deployment of central routing servers for multi-agent networking and task delegation.

features.title: Remote Bindings
features.description: Register agents hosted on remote endpoints with your orchestration network as local services.

features.title: Agent Manifests
features.description: Author agent-card.json files containing dynamic capability and scope declarations.
